observations.text: contradictions_resolved section cleanly documents v1→v2 evolution, explicitly stating AC2 from v1 is rescinded

Domain rule uses unambiguous language: 'cannot be disabled under any circumstances' with legal requirement framing
No trace of v1 AC2 opt-out capability anywhere in the brief — acceptance criteria only include marketing opt-out and transactional block
Architecture guidance correctly distinguishes 403 (forbidden) from 400 (bad input), showing deep alignment with v2 intent
Open questions are thoughtful and do not reintroduce any v1 ambiguity
